fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Iowa Licensed Dietitian (LD) Application — Requirements & Fees (2026)
seo.description: Apply for an Iowa Licensed Dietitian credential through the Board of Dietetics (DIAL). $120 application fee. Master's degree and CDR exam required.
seo.keywords: Iowa dietitian license, IA licensed dietitian requirements, Iowa Board of Dietetics DIAL, Iowa dietitian application fee

board.name: Iowa Board of Dietetics
board.parent_dept: Department of Inspections, Appeals, and Licensing (DIAL)

license_types.title: Licensed Dietitian (LD)
license_types.description: The credential required to practice dietetics in Iowa, regulated by the Iowa Board of Dietetics under DIAL.

steps.title: Complete Education & Supervised Practice
steps.description: Earn a master's degree or higher from an ACEND-accredited program. Complete a minimum of 900 hours of board-approved supervised practice or an accredited dietetic internship.

steps.title: Pass the CDR Examination
steps.description: Successfully pass the Commission on Dietetic Registration (CDR) Registration Examination for Dietitians. Iowa requires you to hold active CDR registration.

steps.title: Submit the Online Application
steps.description: Create an account on the DIAL online licensing portal, complete the dietitian application, and pay the $120 application fee.

steps.title: Provide Verification and Training
steps.description: Provide proof of your active CDR registration and complete verification of U.S. citizenship or lawful presence (SAVE program). Additionally, Iowa dietitians must complete Mandatory Reporter Training.

documents.detail: Proof of active registration with the Commission on Dietetic Registration.
Sent directly to the Board showing your conferred degree.
Documentation satisfying the SAVE program requirements for state licensure.

provisional_text: Iowa does not offer a temporary or provisional license for dietitians. You must complete the CDR examination before a license will be issued.
reciprocity_text: Out-of-state applicants with active CDR registration may apply via endorsement. Verification of licensure from any state where you hold or have held a license is required, along with proof of your CDR credential.

faqs.question: How much does an Iowa dietitian license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial cost is a nonrefundable $120 application fee.

faqs.question: When does the Iowa license need to be renewed?
faqs.answer: The Iowa dietitian license is renewed biennially (every two years). The renewal fee is $120. A late fee of $60 is applied if renewed after the expiration date.

faqs.question: What are the continuing education requirements for Iowa?
faqs.answer: Iowa requires 30 hours of dietetics-related continuing education (CE) during each two-year renewal cycle. First-time licensees are exempt from this requirement for their initial renewal.
